notes: Adds a home_snapshot endpoint: status and profiles are prepared in parallel behind one CGI request
Extends the RAM JSON cache to profiles, alerts, metrics history, health history and router info with conservative TTLs
Invalidates all cached reads before actions that can change VPN selection, routes, scans, health or service state
Keeps the simple interface compatible through a legacy-request fallback if a snapshot is unavailable
Does not change VPN configuration, profile switching, OAuth, Hysteria2 or XRay routing behavior
